focus: Verify that every memory pack is derived from an identifiable source state and preserves the source claim boundary.
Detect stale, superseded, private, invalid, or cross-head memory before retrieval or reuse.
Separate causal support from correlation and require dissent where several root causes remain compatible with evidence.
Prevent retrieval, ranking, or prior memory from becoming approval, execution, delivery, or merge authority.
Require deterministic ranking, bounded disclosure, exact-head manifests, and fail-closed workflow downgrade tests.
